items.title: Three Lebanese journalists killed in Israeli strike, say broadcasters
items.dek: The Israeli military confirms it killed Ali Shoeib from the Hezbollah-affiliated Al Manar TV.
items.body: The Israeli military confirms it killed Ali Shoeib from the Hezbollah-affiliated Al Manar TV.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sacramento Man Who Advertised Resume on Street Corner, Employed Within Hours
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Tears and defiance as Lebanese family bury child, 11, killed in Israeli strike
items.dek: Jawad Younes and his uncle Ragheb were laid to rest on Saturday after their family compound was hit a day earlier.
items.body: Jawad Younes and his uncle Ragheb were laid to rest on Saturday after their family compound was hit a day earlier.
items.author: IriLine Desk
